'''âsh-s-r''' ('''shashasar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nanodispense|nanodispense]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nanodispense|nanodispense]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-s-r
|-
! Lemma
| shashasar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishasar|thishasar]] || [[word:jishasar|jishasar]] || [[word:shishasar|shishasar]] || [[word:kishasar|kishasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushasar|thuthushasar]] || [[word:jujushasar|jujushasar]] || [[word:shushushasar|shushushasar]] || [[word:kukushasar|kukushasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushasar|thushasar]] || [[word:jushasar|jushasar]] || [[word:shushasar|shushasar]] || [[word:kushasar|kushasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushasar|thushasar]] || [[word:jushasar|jushasar]] || [[word:shushasar|shushasar]] || [[word:kushasar|kushasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshasar|theshasar]] || [[word:jeshasar|jeshasar]] || [[word:sheshasar|sheshasar]] || [[word:keshasar|keshasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshasar|thothoshasar]] || [[word:jojoshasar|jojoshasar]] || [[word:shoshoshasar|shoshoshasar]] || [[word:kokoshasar|kokoshasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshasar|thoshasar]] || [[word:joshasar|joshasar]] || [[word:shoshasar|shoshasar]] || [[word:koshasar|koshasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshasar|thoshasar]] || [[word:joshasar|joshasar]] || [[word:shoshasar|shoshasar]] || [[word:koshasar|koshasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshasar|thĂŠshasar]] || [[word:jĂŠshasar|jĂŠshasar]] || [[word:shĂŠshasar|shĂŠshasar]] || [[word:kĂŠshasar|kĂŠshasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashasar|thathashasar]] || [[word:jajashasar|jajashasar]] || [[word:shashashasar|shashashasar]] || [[word:kakashasar|kakashasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashasar|thashasar]] || [[word:jashasar|jashasar]] || [[word:shashasar|shashasar]] || [[word:kashasar|kashasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashasar|thashasar]] || [[word:jashasar|jashasar]] || [[word:shashasar|shashasar]] || [[word:kashasar|kashasar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashasar|shashasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashasar|goshashasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashasar|gokishashasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashasarnĂŒ|shashasarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashasarnknĂŒ|goshashasarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashasarnĂŒ|gokishashasarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashasarshĂ«|shashasarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashasarnkshĂ«|goshashasarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashasarshĂ«|gokishashasarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashasaro|shashasaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashasarnkro|goshashasarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashasaro|gokishashasaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashasarmu|shashasarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashasarnkmu|goshashasarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashasarmu|gokishashasarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashasarsher|shashasarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashasarnksher|goshashasarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashasarsher|gokishashasarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashasarng|shashasarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashasarnkng|goshashasarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashasarng|gokishashasarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashasarya|shashasarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashasarnkya|goshashasarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashasarya|gokishashasarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashasaryam|shashasaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashasarnkyam|goshashasarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashasaryam|gokishashasaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashasarnĂŒshĂ«|shashasarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashasarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashasarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashasarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashasarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashasarnĂŒro|shashasarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashasarnknĂŒro|goshashasarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashasarnĂŒro|gokishashasarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashasarnĂŒmu|shashasarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashasarnknĂŒmu|goshashasarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashasarnĂŒmu|gokishashasarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashasarshĂ«nĂŒ|shashasarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashasarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashasarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashasarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashasarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashasarshĂ«ro|shashasarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashasarnkshĂ«ro|goshashasarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashasarshĂ«ro|gokishashasarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashasarshĂ«mu|shashasarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashasarnkshĂ«mu|goshashasarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashasarshĂ«mu|gokishashasarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashasaronĂŒ|shashasaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashasarnkronĂŒ|goshashasarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashasaronĂŒ|gokishashasaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashasaroshĂ«|shashasaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashasarnkroshĂ«|goshashasarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashasaroshĂ«|gokishashasaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashasaromu|shashasaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashasarnkromu|goshashasarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashasaromu|gokishashasaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashasarmunĂŒ|shashasarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashasarnkmunĂŒ|goshashasarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashasarmunĂŒ|gokishashasarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashasarmushĂ«|shashasarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashasarnkmushĂ«|goshashasarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashasarmushĂ«|gokishashasarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashasarmuro|shashasarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashasarnkmuro|goshashasarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashasarmuro|gokishashasarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
